name_en: (With full set of packaging)!!️ Queen Margaret series bags are crafted from GG Supreme canvas, a versatile material that continues to play a key role in honoring the brand's origins. The 1970s vintage bee design, set with glass pearls and colored crystals, forms the lock of this small handbag! It features a suede-like microfiber lining.
name_cn:
(With full set of packaging)!!️ Queen Margaret series bags are crafted from GG Supreme canvas, a versatile material that continues to play a key role in honoring the brand's origins. The 1970s vintage bee design, set with glass pearls and colored crystals, forms the lock of this small handbag! It features a suede-like microfiber lining.
Model: 476541
Size: 25.5/17.5/13cm
Color: White PVC。
